2398210.name: Interactive Gun Range
2398210.description:
Range day is fun, but paper doesn't shoot back. Interactive Gun Range brings shooting games to real life, using real guns, and real skill. Track multiple moving targets that increase in speed. Test your reaction speed against targets that return fire. Reexperience shooting games from your childhood. Every day is range day, for free. And this can all be done at home, using commonly available and low cost hardware.

Hardware requirements:

Using laser dry fire with your real gun:

  • Laser:  Mantis Dry Fire Laser Training System (for AR-15 style rifles),  the Strikeman SIRT pistol, the DryFireMag, or a Strikeman Laser cartridge

  • Webcam

  • Display: TV with matte screen protector, or projector.

  • Room: A consistently lit, dark or dim room.

Using a Sinden lightgun:

  • Laser: Not required

  • Camera: Not required

  • Display: Any

  • Room: Any
